label: Flow 2 — Normalisation
info:
Receives validated raw events from Flow 1 via link in.
Produces a UnifiedEvent conforming to NODERED_CONTRACT.md:
  - 13 required fields present
  - ai_score / ai_classification MUST NOT be set (Pydantic extra=forbid)
  - payload.kind == event_type (discriminated union)
  - schema_version: 1.0.0

To wire up: in Flow 1, add a 'link out' after each parser output 1 (valid),
point them all to the link in node id: linkin200000001

name:
Flow 2 — Normalisation & Enrichment
Input: validated raw events from Flow 1 (via link in)
Output: UnifiedEvent ready for Kafka events.raw
Contract: NODERED_CONTRACT.md — 13 fields, extra=forbid

HOW TO CONNECT FLOW 1:
Add a 'link out' node after each parser valid output in Flow 1.
Set each link out target to this link in node (id: linkin200000001).
Normalize to UnifiedEvent
Validate before Kafka
